name: Team Ryan
subject: A few words of thanks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Ryan, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Ryan for Congress, Inc
body:
****
**** **** | |
| | **November 11, 2017**
---|---

This is the day Americans have set aside especially to pay tribute to our veterans - the men and women who've selflessly served our country and preserved our freedoms. We owe them much more than one day. In Congress, we are doing our best to give back to them, by fixing the broken VA, preserving education benefits, and giving them a lifeline in times of crisis. We still have a very long way to go, and we will not rest until our veterans have everything they deserve. Here are a few special words of thanks, including from some veterans who are still serving their country in the people's House.
** **
| **** | **Neal Dunn (FL-02)**
---
**Fighting for our veterans******

_
As the son of a veteran, the father of a veteran and a veteran myself, I am committed to ensure those who have "borne the battle" get the care and benefits they need and deserve.

The Department of Veterans Affairs has not met that standard in recent years. Veterans face unreasonable delays in care and benefits, and patients have died in the process. Employee misconduct went unpunished. Mismanagement and poor leadership let our veterans down.

This year, working with the new Veterans Affairs secretary, David Shulkin, House Republicans have sought to right this ship by giving the VA enhanced hiring and firing authority and reforming the VA Choice program, which allows veterans to seek care outside VA facilities. There is more to do._

[**Read More**](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MzE1NjE1MzQS1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTE2MTQ1MzY2MAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
****
| **** | **Brad Wenstrup (OH-02)**
---
**Veterans Day: We celebrate to say thank you**********

_
Our communities are filled with men and women who have served their country - you pass them in the grocery store aisles, we see them in the memorial park, and we see them being honored today. The next time you see a veteran, ask them about what serving their country was like. Their story could change your perspective.

Our veterans serve as a reminder of those who answered the call of a country who needed them, and asked for nothing in return. Their families know sacrifice better than any of us - watching their loved ones head off to war with an unclear future. They were first to the fight. They were the last to ask for anything in return.

To all veterans in Ohio's Second District and across the country who fought for us - thank you. I hope we can continue to fight for you.

Happy Veterans Day._

[**Read More**](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MzE1NjE1MzQS1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTE2MTQ1MzY2MAS2&mt=1&rt=0)****
****
| | **Jack Bergman (MI-01)**
---
**Veterans: our country requires leadership only you can offer**
****

__
_
On this Veterans Day, I submit to our men and women in uniform: your service is not over and your mission is not complete. Now more than ever, our country requires leadership only you can offer. We need you to tell your story of service before self, of country above all and of the American exceptionalism you've experienced along the way. We need you to tell the next generation about those who have gone before us and those who given their all -- of those who sacrificed their homes, loved ones and lives to serve.

We are forever grateful for your service, thank you._

[**Read More**](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MzE1NjE1MzQS1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTE2MTQ1MzY2MAS2&mt=1&rt=0)****
****
| **** | **Jim Banks (IN-03)**
---
**Banks ' efforts for veterans fulfill promise******

_
As Veterans Day approaches, it 's a good moment to note U.S. Rep. Jim Banks' efforts on behalf of men and women who have served.

Wednesday, the House passed the 3rd District Indiana congressman's bill to require the Department of Veterans Affairs to look at how effective its hotline is meeting the needs of troubled veterans.

The bill asks the VA to study how well its Veterans Crisis Hotline responds to calls from ex-servicemen and -women contemplating suicide. The department would be required to report how many of those callers are referred for mental health treatment or to suicide-prevention specialists. This is an urgent problem.

It also is noteworthy when a freshman congressman authors and passes bills. Banks, a Navy reservist, promised as a candidate to champion veterans' issues; he is keeping that promise... ****_

[**Read More**](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MzE1NjE1MzQS1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTE2MTQ1MzY2MAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
****
| **** | **Gus Bilirakis (FL-12)**
---
**Ahead of Veterans Day, House Unanimously Passes a Bill to Help Service Members in a Very Important Way**

_As we celebrate Veterans Day this weekend, I am reminded of the words of President John F. Kennedy: "As we express our gratitude, we must never forget that the highest appreciation is not to utter words, but to live by them."

Throughout my tenure in Congress and as vice chairman of the House Veterans Affairs Committee, I've worked hard to make veterans my top priority. My goal is to honor their sacrifice by serving as their voice in Washington each and every day. It is important to reflect on the progress we have made in ensuring that every veteran receives the care and benefits they have earned, but also remain mindful of how far we have to go in order to achieve this moral imperative._

[**Read More**](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MzE1NjE1MzQS1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTE2MTQ1MzY2MAS2&mt=1&rt=0)****
****
| [](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MzE1NjE1MzQS1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTE2MTQ1MzY2MAS2&mt=1&rt=0) [](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MzE1NjE1MzQS1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTE2MTQ1MzY2MAS2&mt=1&rt=0) [](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MzE1NjE1MzQS1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTE2MTQ1MzY2MAS2&mt=1&rt=0) [](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MzE1NjE1MzQS1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTE2MTQ1MzY2MAS2&mt=1&rt=0) | Paid for by Team Ryan, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Ryan for Congress, Inc., Prosperity Action, Inc., and the NRCC.

Team Ryan
320 First Street, SE
Washington, D.C. 20003
---

****

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: Let’s have breakfast
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
I want to hear what you have to say. |
---
| | | | | | | | [](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=1ce330e538ac01d53b23b6b77647403169757daec07ac1cb9839542d45a01833fd3d32f550674e9023f428ad82b4e066)
---

Peter,

I've been in office for almost one year and I want to make a point of finishing the year how I started it - listening to what REAL Americans have to say. **This time, I 'm doing it over breakfast.**

I would like to invite you to enter for the opportunity to meet me for breakfast in New York City and talk about the direction of our country.

---
| **[Just be sure to make a contribution of $3 or more before the November 27 deadline to be automatically entered.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=1ce330e538ac01d552eb4b352ba0b8bb26c3683738838e8581190c4a9255b67461b4c63f8f8936967111b558cc936b34)**
[CONTRIBUTE $3](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=1ce330e538ac01d5a943fb374b97691dfcaa4e71f36a0a728b9562e1a1468450a0009ed892d0407a09e7413d665db975)
It's always so nice to meet with the American people. The media is CLUELESS when it comes to understanding what voters think about our country. That's why I want to hear it directly from you. So important!

**[Make sure you contribute $3 by November 27 to be automatically entered to win.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=1ce330e538ac01d50d6be0d20d32e0901dd5fc75a0651ccec36bfc65eed6f0359400b8bb7b4ccffca87c67a07a7662bc)**

Looking forward to it,

[](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=1ce330e538ac01d5f2b61198a845cc494f47efe45f16fe9bff3503251e7e711ef97e866a967570be042a8b2862bb2921)
Donald J. Trump
President of the United States
**[CONTRIBUTE $3](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=1ce330e538ac01d5a692ab3d83968553048aae34b76d87c74528822de3150f661e10e7a73f97446913eb513c3bf5b8c8)**
---

NO PURCHASE, PAYMENT, OR CONTRIBUTION NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN. Contributing will not improve your chances of winning. Void where prohibited. You may enter by contributing to Trump Make America Great Again by clicking [here](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=1ce330e538ac01d5a2e2d4ee3372d010f185b795585f91334a6d37cb4ed476835d6dcf1b080996f9c08e6c7452a029c1) Alternatively, you may enter without contributing by clicking [here ](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=1ce330e538ac01d553f4703eeff494aa28ad03c8277be38943b7e4620b6b9e6d6dc790cb7a771dfd2015ab07a69af767) Entries must be received between November 8, 2017 at 12:00 a.m. Eastern Time and November 27, 2017 at 11:59 p.m. Eastern Time. Odds of winning depend on the number of eligible entries received. One (1) winners will receive round-trip transportation and accommodations and tickets to attend the December 2, 2017 Holiday In Manhattan Breakfast in New York, NY(approximate retail value $3000). The Promotion is open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents (green card holders) of the 50 United States, Puerto Rico, and the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age (or the age of majority under applicable law). Winner must be 18 or older (or of majority under applicable law) and meet other requirements as described in the Official Rules. Promotion subject to Official Rules and additional restrictions on eligibility may apply. Visit [here](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=1ce330e538ac01d542bb18f526c6499823549bcbdccdc3ae628be8440f31c1dbbffb0dbd52ecb845e819bd14628ffc0d) for full details and Official Rules. Sponsor: Trump Make America Great Again Committee, 138 Conant Street, 2nd Floor, Beverly, MA 01915. Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J. Trump for President, Inc. and the Republican National Committee. You are receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com
Trump Make America Great Again Committee, 138 Conant Street, 2nd Floor, Beverly, MA 01915

We believe this is an important way to reach our grassroots supporters with the most up-to-date information regarding the efforts of the Trump Make America Great Again Committee and President Trump, and we're glad you're on our team. It's because of grassroots supporters like you that we will Make America Great Again, and we appreciate your support. Thank you for all that you do!

[Privacy Policy](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=1ce330e538ac01d5aa461fba899421b21c23be8a95a62a847baf5a20aea63005ee5fa0547690b5a8b5ad5cb6ed36460e) | [Unsubscribe](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/unsub_center.aspx?qs=2d1444c0c3dd22ab94f61204603c9300073fdcf642878d00a647ec4ac46dd4dba873d12b2589f268f4ce63cdfb994562) | [Update Profile](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/profile_center.aspx?qs=2d1444c0c3dd22ab291494658eff68202d789f94509d4846622e7f02e2077d7b6cb31c2088bc0a18d19c88dfac46e4b3)
---

This time, I 'm doing it over breakfast. I would like to invite you to enter for the opportunity to meet me for breakfast in New York City and talk about the direction of our country. | It's always so nice to meet with the American people. The media is CLUELESS when it comes to understanding what voters think about our country. That's why I want to hear it directly from you. So important! Looking forward to it, Donald J. Trump President of the United States NO PURCHASE, PAYMENT, OR CONTRIBUTION NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN. Contributing will not improve your chances of winning. Void where prohibited. You may enter by contributing to Trump Make America Great Again by clicking Alternatively, you may enter without contributing by clicking Entries must be received between November 8, 2017 at 12:00 a.m. Eastern Time and November 27, 2017 at 11:59 p.m. Eastern Time. Odds of winning depend on the number of eligible entries received. One (1) winners will receive round-trip transportation and accommodations and tickets to attend the December 2, 2017 Holiday In Manhattan Breakfast in New York, NY(approximate retail value $3000). The Promotion is open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents (green card holders) of the 50 United States, Puerto Rico, and the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age (or the age of majority under applicable law). Winner must be 18 or older (or of majority under applicable law) and meet other requirements as described in the Official Rules. Promotion subject to Official Rules and additional restrictions on eligibility may apply. Visit for full details and Official Rules. Sponsor: Trump Make America Great Again Committee, 138 Conant Street, 2nd Floor, Beverly, MA 01915. Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. You are receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com Trump Make America Great Again Committee, 138 Conant Street, 2nd Floor, Beverly, MA 01915 We believe this is an important way to reach our grassroots supporters with the most up-to-date information regarding the efforts of the Trump Make America Great Again Committee and President Trump, and we're glad you're on our team. It's because of grassroots supporters like you that we will Make America Great Again, and we appreciate your support. Thank you for all that you do! | |

name: Tom Perez
subject: re: our candidates, our values, and our party
body:
Thank you.
---
Derek --

I want to send a short note to extend my heartfelt gratitude to you for your help in last Tuesday's historic Democratic wins.

Our wins across the country were because of you.

Thousands of Democrats volunteered from all over the country for our Out of the Commonwealth program, helping send an incredible 3.5 million texts, make thousands of calls, and knock on 262,000 doors in Virginia to get out the vote.

Thousands more volunteered their time across the country to get out the vote in races up and down the ballot, from school board to governor's races.

And hundreds of thousands of Democratic supporters have stepped up and donated this year to fund our work. Whether you gave $3 or $100, we put your resources to good use.

So, thank you. Thank you for believing in our candidates, our values, and our party.

We have a long road ahead of us, but if Tuesday is an indication of our strength, I can't wait to see what we do together in 2018, 2019, and beyond.

In deepest appreciation,

Tom

Tom Perez
Chair
Democratic National Committee

**[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523801/4067b0a/41fc0cd9f/7e59e6dd/3548295043/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Elect-Democrats-20171?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20171112_tp_rem&source=em_20171112_tp_rem&refcode=em_20171112_tp_rem")
**

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523801/4067b0a/41fc0cd9f/7e59e6da/3548295043/VEsF/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20171112_tp_rem&source=em_20171112_tp_rem&refcode=em_20171112_tp_rem"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523801/4067b0a/41fc0cd9f/7e59e6db/3548295043/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20171112_tp_rem&source=em_20171112_tp_rem&refcode=em_20171112_tp_rem"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523801/4067b0a/41fc0cd9f/7e59e6d8/3548295043/VEsD/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20171112_tp_rem&source=em_20171112_tp_rem&refcode=em_20171112_tp_rem") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523801/4067b0a/41fc0cd9f/7e59e6d9/3548295043/VEsA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20171112_tp_rem&source=em_20171112_tp_rem&refcode=em_20171112_tp_rem"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

name: Debbie Wasserman Schultz
subject: Climate change is happening. Now.
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail
body:
| |
---
| |
---
| You know -- here in South Florida, we don't have to question if climate change is happening. We can see it happening all around us. Our communities are expected to be some of the hardest hit by climate change. We aren't debating if climate change is real, we're debating different ways to mitigate its impact. We made some important progress under President Obama. Our country signed the Paris Agreement to reduce the effects of climate change. We instituted the Clean Power Plan, which set out guidelines to cut harmful greenhouse gas emissions and encourage the development of clean and green energy alternatives. **And instead of building on that framework, President Trump seems determined to bulldoze it.** Trump plans to pull the United States out of the Paris Agreement. He's reversing the Clean Power Plan. The Climate-Change-Denier-In-Chief refuses to see what's right in front of his face. Here's the bottom line -- climate change is happening. It's happening now. And we need to do something about it. [**Today I'm joining with some like-minded colleagues and organizations to pressure the administration to act on climate change. Join us by adding your name to ours.**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113e6b/622b7b5b/758e26d/307babbd/1047748301/VEsH/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/climateactionnow/?code=rep-dws&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fdwse171112pm%3Frecurring%3Dtrue%26amount%3D5")**** Thank you. Debbie |
Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
[Click here](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113e6b/622b7b5b/758e26d/307babbc/1047748301/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://www.debbiewassermanschultz.com/subscriptions/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") to unsubscribe
---

We made some important progress under President Obama. Our country signed the Paris Agreement to reduce the effects of climate change. We instituted the Clean Power Plan, which set out guidelines to cut harmful greenhouse gas emissions and encourage the development of clean and green energy alternatives. And instead of building on that framework, President Trump seems determined to bulldoze it. Trump plans to pull the United States out of the Paris Agreement. He's reversing the Clean Power Plan.
